prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约12962名→14197名→16804名→10295名→9021名，整体呈先降后升的V型走势；2023年达到近5年最低点16804名后连 续两年大幅回升，2025年回升至9021名，为近5年最佳水平，较2024年再前移约1274名，显示该校在山东的报考热度持续升温；该校在山东省综合类招生计划202 1年521人、2022年516人、2023年523人、2024年536人、2025年537人，呈小幅扩招趋势；但2026年招生计划大幅缩减至464人，较2025年减少73人，缩招幅度约13.6%， 是本年度最显著的供需变化因素，将明显加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享哈尔滨工业大学品牌；软科中国大学 排名中哈尔滨工业大学校本部2026年位列第12名（Top20），威海校区作为哈工大重要组成部分，享有同等层次声誉，在山东省内具有极高认可度；2026年声誉 评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映考生关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（中关注），但2025年位 次已明显回升，异常影响已消化；依托哈尔滨工业大学校本部学科实力，拥有机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、力学A+、计算机科学与技术 A、软件工程A、控制科学与工程A等17个A-及以上学科，工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、电子信息等工科热门专业持续 高热，与哈工大（威海）2026年招生专业（工科试验班未来信息）高度契合；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），考生 规模扩大进一步加剧优质高校竞争；省控线（普通类一段）近5年稳定在437–444分之间，2025年为441分，预计2026年变化不大；哈尔滨工业大学（威海）校区 位于山东省威海市，属于本省招生，对本省考生具有天然的地域亲和力；该校在山东省投放招生计划人数远多于其他省份，本省考生报考意愿强烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 基准位次9021名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减13.6%、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%以及抖音高热度的报考关注度，竞争压力显著加大，位次应在前移方向；但考虑到2025年位次已处 于近5年最低位（最好水平），继续大幅前移空间有限，区间7735–8735名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全、自动化、通信工程等）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）（机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化、智能制造工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（计算机与电子通信）（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全、通信工程、电子信息工程等）
- 工科试验班（电气与自动化）（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、智能材料与结构）
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备）（机械设计制造及其自动化、机器人工程、车辆工程等）
- 经济管理试验班（工商管理、会计学、国际经济与贸易）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈尔滨工业大学（威海）在山东省综合类招生计划大幅缩减至464人，竞争显著加剧。预测位次区间7735–8735名，建议位次在7500名以内的考生可冲刺一档王牌专业（AI 先进技术领军班、机器人与智能装备拔尖班）；位次在8000–8500名区间以二档专业为主（计算机与电子通信、电气与自动化、软件工程）；位次在8500名以后的考生以三档专业 保底（机器人与智能装备、经济管理试验班、数学类）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 12962 → 14197 → 16804 → 10295 → 9021, showing an overall V-shaped trend of first decreasing and then increasing; after reaching the lowest point in nearly 5 years at 16804 in 2023, it rebounded significantly for two consecutive years, rising to 9021 in 2025, the best level in nearly 5 years, moving forward about 1274 places compared to 2024, indicating that the popularity of this university in Shandong continues to heat up; the enrollment plan for this university in Shandong Province comprehensive category was 521 in 2021, 516 in 2022, 523 in 2023, 536 in 2024, and 537 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend; but the 2026 enrollment plan is sharply reduced to 464, a decrease of 73 from 2025, a reduction of about 13.6%, which is the most significant supply-demand change factor this year and will significantly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing the brand of Harbin Institute of Technology; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus of Harbin Institute of Technology ranked 12th (Top 20) in 2026, and the Weihai campus, as an important part of HIT, enjoys the same level of reputation and has extremely high recognition in Shandong Province; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; the overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 10th (high heat), with large exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high attention from candidates; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission line (medium attention), but the ranking has significantly rebounded in 2025, and the abnormal impact has been digested; relying on the disciplinary strength of the main campus of Harbin Institute of Technology, it has 17 A- and above disciplines including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with top engineering strength nationwide, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continue to be highly sought after, highly consistent with the 2026 enrollment majors of HIT (Weihai) (Engineering Experimental Class Future Information); the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (about 5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025, and the expansion of the candidate scale further intensifies competition for high-quality universities; the provincial control line (General Category First Segment) has been stable between 437–444 points in the past 5 years, with 441 points in 2025, and is expected to change little in 2026; the HIT (Weihai) campus is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, belonging to in-province enrollment, with natural regional affinity for local candidates; the number of enrollment plan places this university allocates in Shandong Province is far more than in other provinces, and the willingness of local candidates to apply is strong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 9021, the 2026 enrollment plan sharply reduced by 13.6%, the increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7%, and the high application attention on Douyin, competition pressure has significantly increased, and the ranking should move forward; but considering that the 2025 ranking is already at the lowest (best level) in nearly 5 years, the room for continued significant forward movement is limited, with a range of 7735–8735.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, Automation, Communication Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) (Robot Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronic Communication) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Automation) (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Intelligent Materials and Structures)
- Software Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robot and Intelligent Equipment) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Robot Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting, International Economics and Trade)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the enrollment plan for Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) in Shandong Province comprehensive category is sharply reduced to 464, significantly intensifying competition. The predicted ranking range is 7735–8735. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 7500 can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (AI Advanced Technology Leading Class, Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class); candidates with rankings in the 8000–8500 range should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Computer and Electronic Communication, Electrical and Automation, Software Engineering); candidates with rankings after 8500 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Robot and Intelligent Equipment, Economics and Management Experimental Class, Mathematics Class).
